research_notes: Focus on micro-educators (5K-100K subscribers/followers) who teach Etsy sellers about digital downloads, print-on-demand, or selling printables. Prioritized creators who discuss image sizing, print quality, DPI, or file preparation.

perfect_fit_creators: Gold City Ventures (printables expertise + sizing guides already published)
Chelsea Shelton (wrote art print sizing guide)
RJ Martinez (POD focus, designs need sizing)
summary.outreach_priority: Start with creators who have already published content about print sizing, DPI, or image quality - they've proven their audience cares about this topic.
